response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience as a software engineer with 15+ years in the industry, including roles as a Staff Software Engineer and Senior Developer across multiple companies. While his experience in AI-specific roles is limited (recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling), his technical breadth, entrepreneurial background (GISCollective), and leadership in open-source projects demonstrate strong potential. His lack of a Master's/PhD in AI and limited direct AI product development experience are notable gaps for this specialized role.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Entrepreneurial experience founding and scaling GISCollective, a cloud-based platform
Strong leadership in technical communities (workshops, talks, and open-source contributions)
concerns: Limited direct experience with AI product development or strategic cloud/AI differentiation
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field as preferred
Recent AI-related work (AI-agent infrastructure) is at the tooling level rather than strategic product innovation
